title: Proxies & Gateways
content:
# System Design Revision

*   **Consistent Hashing:** Uses Virtual Nodes to distribute hash keys evenly across ring servers.
*   **Rate Limiters:** Token Bucket (handles bursts); Leaky Bucket (constant egress rate).
*   **Circuit Breaker:** Closed (normal) $\to$ Open (failing fast) $\to$ Half-Open (probing service health).


*   **Proxies & Gateways Complexity Reference:** Time $O(N)$, Space $O(1)$ auxiliary.
